sections.paragraph:
Original: לוּז

Transliteration: lûz

Phonetic: looz

BDB Definition:

  1. to depart, turn aside
    1. (Qal) to depart
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to go wrong, go crooked
      2. devious, perverse (participle)
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to be lost from view
      2. to become devious

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1090

Part(s) of speech: Verb
